channel.title: U.S. Bankruptcy Court, District of Maine — Local Rules
channel.description: Local Rules of the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of Maine and their amendment history. Prose/link page with no repeating dated list, monitored by full-page fingerprint so rule amendments surface as change items.

item.title: Monitoring started: U.S. Bankruptcy Court, District of Maine — Local Rules
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
